problem_statement: PR #46101: minimal libc + posix: add strerror and perror functions. Fixes issue: libc: minimal: add strerror() function. Add basic `strerror()` and `perror()` implementations to the minimal C library. Also add myself as collaborator in that area. With a simple change to `samples/hello_world`, we observe the following size differences on cortex-m3: Before change: ``` Memory region Used Size Region Size %age Used FLASH:
